visualTone: Hyper-saturated neon bleeds into rain-slicked asphalt; corporate logos burn through acid haze like infected wounds that refuse to close
colorPalette: Cyan and magenta dominants, acid-yellow accents, absolute blacks; holographic white cuts through chemical smog in hard geometric shafts
atmosphericDetails: Perpetual acid rain refracts neon into prismatic halos; drone swarms pulse at subsonic frequencies; chrome corrodes overnight; AR overlays compete with physical signage for every surface
narrativeVoice: Rapid-fire and kinetic; street-level observations delivered at the speed of a data-spike; cynical but not yet broken
